Automatic Tracking

Development Dashboard

Automatic progress tracking from agent outputs. Plan status, velocity metrics, quality trends, and activity timelines — zero manual reporting.

epost-project-manager epost-journal-writer epost-planner

Data Sources

Every metric is derived from existing agent outputs — no extra instrumentation needed.

plans/ Phase completion, estimated vs actual, blockers epost-planner
plans/*/status.md Key decisions, known bugs, deferred items, progress table epost-planner
reports/ Audit results, code review findings, test coverage epost-code-reviewer
Git history Commit frequency, PR cycle time, merge rate epost-git-manager
Agent logs Agent dispatch count, skill usage, error rates epost-project-manager
docs/ ADR count, knowledge base growth, entry staleness epost-docs-manager
◈

The Report Writes Itself

Developers hate status reports. Managers need visibility. This dashboard bridges the gap — every plan update, audit result, and commit creates a data point automatically. Sprint retros have real numbers. Standups have real progress. Nobody spent time writing a report.

◈ epost_agent_kit v2.0.0
Works with any AI coding assistant
